criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: Engagement Metrics
criteria.description: Metrics such as daily active users (DAU) and monthly active users (MAU).

criteria.name: Educational Content Quality
criteria.description: Quality and variety of educational content offered by the app.
criteria.sources: Expert reviews, educational blogs, user feedback

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI features integrated into the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, tech reviews, developer documentation

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use, design, and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, design awards, UI/UX analysis

criteria.name: Accessibility Features
criteria.description: Features that make the app accessible to users with disabilities.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, accessibility reviews, developer notes

criteria.name: In-App Purchases and Subscription Models
criteria.description: Cost and value of in-app purchases and subscription plans.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, user reviews

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app on different platforms (iOS, Android, Web, etc.).
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, official app websites

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and improvements.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, developer blogs
